title: Nyemo Heavy Rain
lead: Nyemo is experiencing a critical heavy rain event with a Z-Score of -3.26. This anomaly has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The heavy rain in Nyemo is causing significant disruptions with a high umidity level of 87% and wind speed of 3.8 km/h. 
 The HDD value of 12.4 GG and CDD value of 0.0 GG indicate a high heating demand due to the cold and wet conditions. 
 The critical level of this event requires immediate attention to mitigate potential damages and risks.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to address the critical situation in Nyemo.
agri_impact: Crops at risk due to flooding
